archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) mixed with Minimalistic Futurism
design_philosophy: A future quantum researcher exploring technology from within a peaceful misty forest. Minimalist, Futuristic, Elegant, Nature-inspired. Glassmorphism 2.0 with functional depth and organic layouts.

headings.style: Subtle rustic glow (text-shadow) - slight silver, pale blue, or soft white illumination.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Organic asymmetry. Bento styles for projects and strengths.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-[2rem] for large cards, rounded-full for buttons/tags

surfaces_and_glassmorphism.cards: Optical Clarity glass. backdrop-blur-xl, subtle 1px border. Shadow: shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)]
surfaces_and_glassmorphism.buttons: Smooth pill-shaped (rounded-full). Hover transforms (hover:scale-105, hover:-translate-y-1) with soft shadow.
surfaces_and_glassmorphism.nav: Sticky header with crystal glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-2xl, semi-transparent background) and dark mode toggle.

motion_and_interactions.global: Smooth scrolling. Scroll reveal staggered entrance animations.
motion_and_interactions.background_light: Animated misty forest: Full-screen fixed background image. Use framer-motion to slowly translate fog layers (blurred, low-opacity white/cyan divs) horizontally to create drifting fog and subtle parallax.
motion_and_interactions.background_dark: Animated moonlit forest: Full-screen fixed background image. Deep blue gradients. Generate small glowing divs that animate opacity (blink) and translate slightly (drift) to act as fireflies.
motion_and_interactions.progress_bars: Animate width from 0% to target% on scroll intersection (framer-motion or useInView).
motion_and_interactions.timeline: Vertical animated timeline. Line drawn downwards as user scrolls, dots glowing upon reaching them.

light_mode_forest.usage: Static/Parallax base image for the light mode background (Misty forest)

dark_mode_forest.usage: Static/Parallax base image for the dark mode background (Moonlit night sky over forest)

sections.name: Hero
sections.content: Aditya Anand, B.Tech CSE AI&ML student, future quantum researcher.
sections.components: Profile photo, Name (large text, subtle glow), Tagline, Pill buttons (Resume: 'Resume under construction' / Contact)

sections.name: About Me
sections.content: Brief intro + Interests as floating rounded tags.
sections.components: Glass text card, Flex-wrap pill tags for interests.

sections.name: Core Strengths
sections.components: 3-col bento grid, Glass cards with subtle icons.

sections.name: Current Learning Journey
sections.components: List of skills grouped by category, with animated progress bars (framer-motion).

sections.name: Achievements & Certifications
sections.components: Image cards displaying the certificate media_urls inside a glass container.

sections.name: Future Roadmap
sections.components: Vertical animated timeline with glowing markers.

sections.name: Projects
sections.components: Grid of rounded frosted glass cards.

sections.name: Contact
sections.components: LinkedIn (https://www.linkedin.com/in/adityaanand-quant), Email (thesuperman183@gmail.com), WhatsApp (9852767442). Big pill buttons.

sections.name: Footer
sections.components: Minimalist center-aligned footer with glass separator.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (kebab-case, role-based). Examples: `data-testid="nav-contact-link"`, `data-testid="hero-resume-button"`.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over frosted glass meets APCA/WCAG standards. Use text-shadow for better legibility where needed.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use `framer-motion` extensively for scroll reveals, parallax, and the background mist/fireflies animations.
Implement a Dark Mode toggle in the sticky nav that switches between the light forest and dark forest backgrounds and their respective overlay animations (mist vs fireflies).

For the misty forest background (Light Mode), layer the provided light background image with moving semi-transparent white/cyan divs (blurred via backdrop-blur or CSS filter) to simulate drifting fog.
For the dark mode, use the provided dark forest background image and generate random small glowing divs that animate opacity (blink) and translate slightly (drift) to act as fireflies.
Do NOT use placeholder images. Use ONLY the media URLs provided in this JSON.
Ensure the UI uses highly rounded components (`rounded-[2rem]` for cards, `rounded-full` for buttons) and prominent glassmorphism (backdrop-blur, slight borders, semi-transparent backgrounds).
Headings must have a subtle text-shadow (glow) as requested: light mode (silver/pale blue), dark mode (soft white).
